title: execution-result
description: Canonical machine-readable result envelope for agent-facing workflow scripts. Emit this when a helper returns multiple fields or when the caller must distinguish ok/warning/error and know how to continue.

status.description: ok=workflow completed successfully, warning=completed with degradation or caveat, error=caller intervention or alternate branch required

summary.description: Single human-readable sentence summarizing the result

data.description: Primary payload for the caller. Keep it stable and machine-oriented.

errors.description: Known problems encountered while producing the result. Empty on clean success.

retryable.description: Whether retrying the same step may succeed

suggested_fix.description: Concrete remediation guidance for the caller or human

continue_with.description: How the caller can degrade gracefully or continue without a fix

blocked_by.description: Optional list of missing dependencies, files, services, or prerequisites

details.description: Optional structured context useful for debugging or branching

next_steps.description: Actions the caller can take next. Prefer 0-3 concrete items.

id.description: Stable identifier for this next step

automatable.description: Whether the caller can perform this action automatically

open_items.description: Remaining work or unresolved questions after this script finished.

blocking.description: Whether this item blocks the caller's main path

owner.description: Optional responsible agent, team, or human

contract_version.description: Version string for this result contract

producer.description: Script or helper name that produced the envelope

schema.description: Path or URI to the schema the result conforms to

dry_run.description: Whether the result was generated in dry-run mode
